title: Habit Heroes
subtitle: Good habits lift you up!
goalMeaning: You made it to the top with lots of good habits. You're a superstar!

ladders.name: Sharing
ladders.meaning: You shared your toy with a friend. Climb up, superstar!

ladders.name: Brushing teeth
ladders.meaning: Sparkly clean teeth! Up you go!

ladders.name: Saying sorry
ladders.meaning: Saying sorry is brave and kind. Climb higher!

ladders.name: Helping out
ladders.meaning: You helped tidy the room. What a star!

ladders.name: Eating veggies
ladders.meaning: Yummy veggies make you strong. Climb!

ladders.name: Reading
ladders.meaning: Reading takes you to wonderful new heights!

ladders.name: Kindness
ladders.meaning: You were kind to a friend. Soar up high!

snakes.name: Screen time
snakes.meaning: Too much screen time. Oops, slide back down.

snakes.name: Fibbing
snakes.meaning: A little fib grew big. Down you go.

snakes.name: No breakfast
snakes.meaning: No breakfast means no energy. Slide down.

snakes.name: Messiness
snakes.meaning: Toys everywhere! Tidy up and try again.

snakes.name: Teasing
snakes.meaning: Teasing isn't kind. Down the slide.

snakes.name: Staying up
snakes.meaning: Too little sleep. Whoops, slide down.

snakes.name: Wasting food
snakes.meaning: Try not to waste food. Down you go.

snakes.name: Forgetting
snakes.meaning: Remember your manners. Slide back a bit.
